016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo;
017
018import java.time.Instant;
019import java.util.List;
020import java.util.Optional;
021
022import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
023import org.bitcoinj.base.Address;
024
025public class AddressInfo {
026    private final Address address;
027    private final String scriptPubKey;
028    private final boolean ismine;
029    private final boolean solvable;
030    private final String desc;
031    private final boolean iswatchonly;
032    private final boolean isscript;
033    private final boolean iswitness;
034    private final String pubkey;
035    private final boolean iscompressed;
036    private final String label;
037    private final boolean ischange;
038    private final Instant timestamp;
039    private final List<Object> labels;
040
041    /**
042     *
043     * @param address
044     * @param ischange
045     * @param ismine
046     * @param label
047     * @param iswatchonly
048     * @param iswitness
049     * @param labels
050     * @param scriptPubKey
051     * @param solvable
052     * @param isscript
053     * @param iscompressed
054     * @param desc
055     * @param pubkey
056     * @param timestamp
057     */
058    public AddressInfo(@JsonProperty("address") Address address,
059                       @JsonProperty("scriptPubKey") String scriptPubKey,
060                       @JsonProperty("ismine") boolean ismine,
061                       @JsonProperty("solvable") boolean solvable,
062                       @JsonProperty("desc") String desc,
063                       @JsonProperty("iswatchonly") boolean iswatchonly,
064                       @JsonProperty("isscript") boolean isscript,
065                       @JsonProperty("iswitness") boolean iswitness,
066                       @JsonProperty("pubkey") String pubkey,
067                       @JsonProperty("iscompressed") boolean iscompressed,
068                       @JsonProperty("label") String label,
069                       @JsonProperty("ischange") boolean ischange,
070                       @JsonProperty("timestamp") Long timestamp,
071                       @JsonProperty("labels") List<Object> labels) {
072        super();
073        this.address = address;
074        this.scriptPubKey = scriptPubKey;
075        this.ismine = ismine;
076        this.solvable = solvable;
077        this.desc = desc;
078        this.iswatchonly = iswatchonly;
079        this.isscript = isscript;
080        this.iswitness = iswitness;
081        this.pubkey = pubkey;
082        this.iscompressed = iscompressed;
083        this.label = label;
084        this.ischange = ischange;
085        this.timestamp = timestamp != null ? Instant.ofEpochSecond(timestamp) : null;
086        this.labels = labels;
087    }
088
089    public Address getAddress() {
090        return address;
091    }
092
093    public String getScriptPubKey() {
094        return scriptPubKey;
095    }
096
097    public boolean getIsmine() {
098        return ismine;
099    }
100
101    public boolean getSolvable() {
102        return solvable;
103    }
104
105    public String getDesc() {
106        return desc;
107    }
108
109    public boolean getIswatchonly() {
110        return iswatchonly;
111    }
112
113    public boolean getIsscript() {
114        return isscript;
115    }
116
117    public boolean getIswitness() {
118        return iswitness;
119    }
120
121    public String getPubkey() {
122        return pubkey;
123    }
124
125    public boolean getIscompressed() {
126        return iscompressed;
127    }
128
129    public String getLabel() {
130        return label;
131    }
132
133    public boolean getIschange() {
134        return ischange;
135    }
136
137    /**
138     * @return The creation time of the key, if available
139     */
140    public Optional<Instant> getTimestamp() {
141        return Optional.ofNullable(timestamp);
142    }
143
144    public List<Object> getLabels() {
145        return labels;
146    }
147}
